description: Blue wallet with an all-over gold and blue print and blue coloured flap with buckle on the front Has two main comaprtments and one pocket with a magnetic button flap closure on the front One compartment has zip closure with a currency slot and six card holdersOther compartment has zip closure, has two slots separated by fabric and one id card holder Size Height: 10 cm  Width: 11 cm Depth: 2 cm
